title: Append on the cloud
body:
# Brief introduction
This is an add-on package for MTR mods below version 1.20. Many cars have been added to the additional package to realize your subway dreams.

![icon](https://gitcode.net/mincraftmojang/fallacy-mountain-extension/-/raw/master/2023-07-16_10.55.11.png)

# note
* Not applying additional packages below R8 to version 1.20 will render errors!!

# Having problems?
* Escalate at [KOOK](https://kook.top/Btr4j0) (Chinese players only)
  * recommend
* Escalate in [Discord](https://discord.gg/G2ENd4AJQD)(Valid until August 15, 2023).
  * Not recommended

# Acknowledgement
* [MTRBBS](https://www.mtrbbs.top/) tutorial provided
* Original texture packs available in Minecraft 1.16
